summary: Chat delete + auto-delete settings feature fully verified. 17/17 backend tests pass. Frontend: user ChatPage (header, tick, timestamp, long-press delete modal, delete works) and admin Chat tab (Clear All, Auto-Delete settings, per-user delete, per-message hover delete) all functional. Fixed one critical missing useState bug in AdminChatInbox.js.

issues: Pre-existing React warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' from BrowserRouter/AdminLoginPage (navigate() called during render). Non-blocking but should be wrapped in useEffect.

passed_tests: Backend GET /api/admin/chat/auto-delete-setting returns {enabled,hours} defaults
Backend POST /api/admin/chat/auto-delete-setting persists enabled+hours (upsert into db.settings key=chat_auto_delete)
Backend auto-delete-setting hours<1 clamped to 1
Backend auto-delete-setting requires admin auth (401 without)
Backend DELETE /api/admin/chat/clear-all requires admin, deletes all messages
Backend DELETE /api/admin/chat/user/{user_id} requires admin
Backend DELETE /api/admin/chat/message/{id} requires admin, returns 404 for nonexistent id
Backend DELETE /api/chat/message/{id} requires auth
Backend user can delete own text message and it disappears from GET /api/chat/messages
Backend user CANNOT delete admin's message (returns 404 as designed - filter by sender=user)
Backend user DELETE of nonexistent id returns 404
Backend POST /api/chat/send works for text, empty text (whitespace-only) rejected with 400
Backend GET /api/chat/messages & GET /api/admin/chat/messages/{user_id} work and mark read
Frontend /chat header shows exact text 'MATKA11 CASTUMER SUPPORT' with Online indicator
Frontend user sent message shows Check (single tick) SVG initially with timestamp in hh:mm AM/PM format
Frontend right-click (context menu) on own message opens delete modal with Delete Message button
Frontend Delete Message button removes message from chat UI (verified via DOM check)
Frontend Admin panel Chat tab loads without crash after fixing missing useState for showSettings/autoDel
Frontend Admin Chat shows Clear All + Auto-Delete buttons, per-user trash icon visible in user rows
Frontend Auto-Delete settings panel shows checkbox toggle + hours input; values persist after reload
action_items: Main agent: Verify the useState fix I applied to /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminChatInbox.js (added showSettings + autoDel state). Without it, the Admin Chat tab would crash with 'setShowSettings is not defined' the moment admin opens Chat tab.

Optional: Real touch-device long-press was simulated via right-click (contextmenu handler). Both paths use the same setSelectedMsg call, so functionally equivalent, but consider testing on real mobile device/Android Chrome devtools for 500ms touchstart timer.
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL (fixed by tester): /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminChatInbox.js was missing useState declarations for showSettings/setShowSettings and autoDel/setAutoDel though it referenced them in JSX/handlers. This would crash the admin Chat tab on mount. Added: const [showSettings, setShowSettings] = useState(false); const [autoDel, setAutoDel] = useState({enabled:false, hours:24});
Minor: ChatPage.js handlePressStart declares pressTimer inside .map iterator closure - works because each iteration creates its own closure, but consider useRef for cleaner lifecycle.
Minor: chat_routes.py delete_many in clear-all with no index on user_id could be slow on large collections; consider ensuring index exists.
Good: Auth check in DELETE /api/chat/message/{id} filters by {user_id, sender:'user'} which correctly prevents user from deleting admin messages or other users' messages (returns 404).
Good: attachment_url cleanup logic in all delete endpoints properly removes uploaded files from disk.

test_credentials.user: Created on-the-fly via /api/auth/otp/send + verify + complete-signup; OTP read from /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log

seed_data_creation: Tests register a throwaway user with phone 9XXXXXXXXX and prefix TEST_ for cleanup identification. Clear-all test wipes chat_messages collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All chat delete + auto-delete endpoints tested via /app/backend/tests/test_chat_delete.py (pytest). Admin UI now loads after adding missing useState hooks. User delete flow triggered via onContextMenu (right-click) and long-press (500ms touchstart). Known pre-existing React warning on AdminLoginPage render is unrelated to this iteration.
rca of the issue: Missing useState hooks in AdminChatInbox.js - references to showSettings/setShowSettings/autoDel/setAutoDel existed in JSX handlers but state was never declared. RCA: likely partial implementation where state hooks were omitted during the WhatsApp redesign refactor. Reproduction: open /admin → click Chat tab → ReferenceError in console / blank tab. Mitigation applied: added both state declarations with sensible defaults (showSettings=false, autoDel={enabled:false, hours:24}).
